signals.headline: Flagg Passes Knueppel as ROY Favorite After 96-Point Weekend | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Flagg Passes Knueppel as ROY Favorite After 96-Point Weekend | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Cooper Flagg overtook Kon Knueppel as the NBA Rookie of the Year odds favorite on DraftKings Sportsbook, moving from +225 to -250 while Knueppel shifted to +180, following Flagg's record 51- and 45-point games—first rookie since Allen Iverson to average 45+ points, 5+ rebounds, and 5+ assists over two games.[2
